stemHtml: During the flight preparation stage, the flight crew are doing mass and balance calculations when they find the centre of gravity CG positions for the actual take-off mass, landing mass, and zero fuel mass. All three CG positions are located within the CG envelope, and they are close to the aft CG limit. When compared to a more forward CG position, the flight crew should expect to have (1) in fuel consumption and (2) in range.
